title: Migrated Project State To Studio JavaScript Shell
summary: Added the minimal Studio JavaScript app shell, moved Project State route body markup into a browser module, marked Project State as a JavaScript shell route, and changed Python dispatch to serve the generic app bootstrap for that route.
effect: Project State is now the first Local Studio route whose common shell and route body are browser-owned while preserving the existing route controller, backend APIs, Docs Viewer link behavior, and ready-state contract.
